prose:
**Acrolein Fukui Reactivity Descriptors** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, plain RKS, no density fitting) in PySCF via chemkit; gas phase; charge 0; multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz` (**single-point** at fixed geometry). SCF converged; no warnings reported. Condensed Fukui functions (Mulliken, PySCF) yielded:

• fukui_plus (electrophilic) per atom: [0.40136419, 0.022255106, 0.43404673, 0.64232102, -0.1572595, -0.2072029, -0.062116996, -0.073407645]
• fukui_minus (nucleophilic) per atom: [0.39388616, 0.0059884353, 0.091403097, 0.087369815, 0.085961423, 0.1856796, 0.084485809, 0.065225658]
• dual_descriptor: [0.0074780351, 0.01626667, 0.34264363, 0.5549512, -0.24322092, -0.39288251, -0.14660281, -0.1386333]

Most electrophilic site: atom 4 (C), f_plus = 0.64232102. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f_minus = 0.39388616. Files: JSON output at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpo56n8y42/live.json`. CLI command: 
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpo56n8y42/live.json
```
